name: flesh_raptor.live_open_field_skirmisher_mcw
description: Live open-field raptor row: one staged hostile flesh raptor at skirmish range records orbit turns, bounded swoop cadence, hit/equipment/frustration notes, and log/perf stability.

steps.label: post_load_raptor_open_field_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged flesh-raptor open-field fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_raptor_open_field
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live flesh-raptor window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before open-field raptor skirmish window

steps.label: audit_saved_flesh_raptor_before_open_field
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario raptor footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile flesh raptor starts five tiles east at skirmish range

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_raptor_open_field
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live raptor window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_raptor_open_field_skirmish_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window records orbit planning, periodic swoop windows, and raptor melee outcomes when a swoop reaches the avatar

steps.label: audit_flesh_raptor_open_field_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked orbit, cadence-swoop, or raptor melee-event lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves open-field raptor planning reaches orbit pressure, bounded swoop cadence, and concrete melee hit/miss/armor-absorb outcomes for frustration metrics

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live flesh raptor at visible skirmish range uses the monster::plan seam to orbit at 4-6 tiles, periodically swoop, and emit concrete combat-result metrics instead of behaving only as generic hit-and-run retreat
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for flesh-raptor live skirmisher behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan/combat behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim. Equipment-damage frustration stays explicit: raptor melee_event records hit/miss/armor-absorb outcomes, while destructive equipment messages remain a player-message/screen metric when present rather than a tuned-up difficulty lever.
